theme_and_archetype.description: Premium, elegant, trustworthy e-commerce experience for high-end gold jewelry, using a pristine white base with sophisticated shiny gold accents.

typography.logo_styling: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black bg-gradient-to-r from-[#BF953F] via-[#FCF6BA] to-[#B38728] text-transparent bg-clip-text drop-shadow-sm tracking-widest
typography.heading_styling: text-3xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-[#1A1A1A]

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Tetris Grid for campaign section (asymmetric bento), Control Room dense grids for checkout/cart summary

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with a delicate 1px border-b border-black/5. Must have z-50.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards_and_campaigns: Flat Solid variant: subtle bg-[#FAFAFA] with 1px border-[#E5E5E5]. Hover effects include slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-xl.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.checkboxes: Professional: Custom Shadcn Checkbox with data-[state=checked]:bg-[#D4AF37] data-[state=checked]:border-[#D4AF37] data-[state=checked]:text-white. Use select-none cursor-pointer for labels.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.footer: High contrast minimal: solid #FAFAFA background, generous padding py-24.

components_and_interactions.navigation: Top-mid 'MIR' logo. Right side: Menu button containing 'Hesabım' (My Account), 'Ödeme Yöntemleri' (Payment Methods), 'Sipariş Geçmişi' (Order History). Top right Shopping Cart. Mobile responsive sheet/drawer.
components_and_interactions.categories: Prominent grid or carousel highlighting '8 Ayar', '14 Ayar', '21 Ayar', '22 Ayar' (Turkish for karats).
components_and_interactions.campaign_section: Bento grid layout for seasonal offers ('Sezon İndirimleri'). Overlapping elements with high-quality imagery.
components_and_interactions.checkbox_labels: Must be aligned optically, left-aligned, proper spacing (gap-3), muted secondary text for descriptions if needed.
components_and_interactions.buttons: Primary: Solid gold background (bg-[#D4AF37]) or gold gradient with white text. Hover: Lighter gold. Fully rounded or crisp slight radius (rounded-md).

hero_banner.description: Cinematic wide hero banner of luxury gold jewelry resting on white silk.

campaign_images.description: Stylish woman wearing elegant gold jewelry, used for seasonal offers/campaigns.
Elegant composition of gold bracelets, used for campaign bento grids.

specific_requirements.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, checkboxes) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button').
specific_requirements.icons: Use lucide-react (default) with thin stroke-width (e.g., strokeWidth={1.5}) to match the luxury aesthetic.
specific_requirements.authentication: Required components for login/register, must match luxury aesthetic with gold accents and professional checkboxes for terms/conditions.
